creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
Here is a workaround to make y4mscaler build and work again, as seen on the mjpeg-users mailing list :

http://sourceforge.net/mailarchive/message.php?msg_name=4668-Mon07Jan2008135449-0500-maddog%40mir.com

It defines missing LOG_* symbols and will allow to wait patiently for v9.1 (in which this bug will be fixed).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
